blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
